steps.title: Identify what Harcourt and Bennett have in common
steps.content: The question asks to emphasize a similarity between the two figures. The notes show both were actor-managers: each managed a theater and performed there.

steps.title: Find which choice shows this parallel
steps.content:
As actor-managers, both Harcourt and Bennett managed theaters where they also performed. names both figures and presents them with parallel roles and actions—both actor-managers who managed theaters where they also performed.

The other three options either omit a figure, misrepresent the facts, or emphasize differences rather than similarities.

That matches the correct answer — B is correct.
